_name: config2 — tighter entry filters + faster breakeven exit
_notes: max_single_buy threshold: 0.80 → 0.65 SOL (blocks RAGENALD-type bait: 0.664 SOL first buy -10.1%)
min_avg_buy floor added: ≥ 0.06 SOL (blocks bot-farmed volume: Javis 15 buys at 0.055 avg -9.7%)
Breakeven exit floor raised: <+2% → <+3% (fires 1% earlier, exits closer to 0% vs -4%)
Late-entry cutoff lowered: ≥10% → ≥7% (TX takes 3s — momentum exhausted by confirmation)
